name: GT-jb-submult
source: HOS, refs/hos/joa-m.md:2306-2312 (3.1.3, Jordan Banach algebra norm axiom), VERBATIM: "A Jordan Banach algebra is a real Jordan algebra A equipped with a complete norm satisfying $||a \circ b|| \leq ||a|| \, ||b||, \qquad a, b \in A.$" V=B(H)_sa is a JB algebra, so ||a∘b||<=||a|| ||b||.
